session.assistant:
Let me execute the plan-save workflow.
**Step 1: Parse Arguments** — No flags passed, so all flags are empty.
**Step 2: Generate Branch Slug** — From the plan title "Add `--dry-run` to `erk pr teleport`":
Branch slug: `add-teleport-dry-run`
**Step 3: Generate Plan Summary**
Adds a --dry-run flag to erk pr teleport that previews what local state would be discarded (unpushed commits, uncommitted changes) and what mutative operations would be performed, without actually executing them. Uses the conditional-return pattern consistent with other erk dry-run implementations.
**Step 4: Run Save Command**

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: erk exec plan-save --format json --session-id="2bb19530-57a0-4bbf-9a28-1101a48542a2" --bra...[truncated 233 chars]...m. Uses the conditional-return pattern consistent with other erk dry-run implementations."
Save plan as draft PR via erk plan-save

session.tool_result: {"success": true, "pr_number": 9226, "pr_url": "https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/9226", "title": "[erk-pr] Plan: Add `--dry-run` to `erk pr teleport`", "branch_name": "plnd/add-teleport-dry-run-03-12-1352", "plan_backend": "planned_pr", "objective_issue": null, "archived_to": "/Users/schrockn/.erk/repos/erk/worktrees/erk-slot-64/.erk/scratch/sessions/2bb19530-57a0-4bbf-9a28-1101a48542a2/plan_snapshots/000001-9187bb50"}
session.assistant:
No `objective_issue` in the output, so skipping Steps 5 and 6.
**Step 7: Push Planning Session**

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Get session file path for push

tool_use.name: Bash
